title.en: pH Indicators — Two Colours Through One pKa
title.ko: pH 지시약 — 하나의 pKa, 두 색

subtitle.en: an acid-base indicator is a weak acid whose protonated and deprotonated forms have different chromophores; at pH = pKa they coexist 1:1 and the colour is the mixture
subtitle.ko: 산-염기 지시약은 양성자화/탈양성자화 형태의 색이 다른 약산 — pH=pKa에서 1:1 공존, 색은 혼합

description.en: Henderson-Hasselbalch sigmoid drives an interpolated swatch between acid and base colours. Three classic indicators (methyl orange 3.7, BTB 7.1, phenolphthalein 9.4) with mini swatches.
description.ko: Henderson-Hasselbalch S곡선이 산-염기 색 사이를 보간. 세 고전 지시약(methyl orange 3.7, BTB 7.1, phenolphthalein 9.4) 미니 swatch.
